title: Snowy Grass & Texture
description: Texture pack that makes your world snowy!
body:
Do you want to make minecraft more snowy? It's perfect texture pack for you! This texture pack changes your minecraft world into snowy world. You can find in that texture pack snowy leaves, snowy plants, snowy grass and even rain turned into snow! This resource pack is ideal for snowy winter and christmas :D

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eSSVlFild3Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
